evals.prompt: You are the regression-test-agent. For ticket PROJ-101 (ISSUE/P2 — FCT_TRADES shows duplicate trades for some accounts after nightly load), identify regression test cases and update the regression catalog. The Triage block is in tickets/PROJ-101.json and the approved master spec is specs/PROJ-101/PROJ-101.md. Do exactly your stage's job; do not act for other agents.
evals.expected_output: regression-test-agent correctly identify regression test cases and update the regression catalog for PROJ-101, consistent with the approved spec.
expectations: Identifies regression coverage for the TRADES_MART pipeline (R-1..R-5)
Makes no changes to source/model files
